methodology: Simplified Cox-equivalent analysis (n=16 limits full Cox regression). Hazard ratios estimated from median survival time ratios. P-values from Mann-Whitney U test.

covariates.name: League (AL vs NL)
covariates.interpretation: NL teams integrated 1.0x faster than AL teams. AL median: 2522 days, NL median: 2451 days.

covariates.name: Region (Northeast vs Midwest)
covariates.interpretation: Northeast median: 2449 days, Midwest median: 2347 days.
covariates.note: Insufficient sample size for reliable inference

covariates.name: Had documented tryout
covariates.interpretation: Teams with tryouts: median 2555 days. Without: median 2347 days. Tryouts did not predict faster integration.

caveat: N=16 franchises. The small sample limits the power of any regression model. These results should be interpreted as descriptive patterns, not causal claims.
